name: ExtensionCareTeam_Participant_Coverage
title: R5: When the member is generally available within this care team (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` 0..1 `Period, Timing`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` 0..1 `Period, Timing`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` has a context of CareTeam.participant based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CareTeam`.
Element `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: When the member is generally available within this care team (new)
element.comment:
Element `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` has a context of CareTeam.participant based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CareTeam`.
Element `CareTeam.participant.coverage[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This is populated while creating / managing the CareTeam to ensure there is coverage when servicing CarePlan activities from the Schedule.
